name: ExtensionTransport_Code
title: R5: Transport Type (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Transport.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Transport.code` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Transport.code` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Transport.code` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Transport.code` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The title (eg "My Transports", "Outstanding Transports for Patient X") should go into the code.

element.definition: A name or code (or both) briefly describing what the transport involves.
element.comment: The title (eg "My Transports", "Outstanding Transports for Patient X") should go into the code.

binding.description: Codes to identify what the transport involves.  These will typically be specific to a particular workflow.
